claim_scope: sealed exploratory bounded quotient induction on a previously inspected tuning split; not confirmation, language reasoning, or a genuine-general-reasoning claim

custody_boundary.hard_selection: one model-owned threshold at zero followed by complete signature-row equality
custody_boundary.label_join: audited offline final target relations by packet SHA-256, placed through tensorizer axis receipts
custody_boundary.objective: balanced final fiber/relation + smooth-max physical descent + final-relation fixed point + active-bit margin
custody_boundary.physical_residuals: regularized and reported, never used to repair the hard output

development_evaluation.hard_decoder: one threshold over learned bits, then complete signature-row equality with immutable observation fibers

parameter_ledger.integration_status: standalone MCTFR; complete-system count is hypothetical accounting

protected_base.integration_status: not integrated; complete-system count is hypothetical accounting

train_evaluation.hard_decoder: one threshold over learned bits, then complete signature-row equality with immutable observation fibers
